zh.Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭艾斯爾登東納爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elena Stewart於大約1255年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾時，她的父親Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith38歲，母親Mary Menteith32歲。她於1279年與John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox在蘇格蘭斯林史爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1304年10月之後在英國蘇格蘭，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland: 苏格兰艾斯爾登東納爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elena Stewart于大约1255年出生在英国苏格兰阿吉爾时，她的父亲Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith38岁，母亲Mary Menteith32岁。她于1279年与John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox在苏格兰斯林史爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1304年10月之后在英国苏格兰，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Elena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , now used quite frequently in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Elena Stewart was born about 1255, in Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith, was 38 and her mother, Mary Menteith, was 32. She married John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox in 1279, in Stirlingshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died after October 1304, in Scotland, United Kingdom, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elena Stewart est née environ 1255, à Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Mary Menteith, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox en 1279, à Stirlingshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après octobre 1304, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elena Stewart um 1255 in Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith 38 und ihre Mutter Mary Menteith 32. Sie hat 1279 in Stirlingshire, Scotland John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach Oktober 1304 in Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elena Stewart è nata il circa 1255 nel Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Mary Menteith, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox nel 1279, nel Stirlingshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il ottobre 1304, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Elena Stewartが約1255年にイギリススコットランドアルグイルで生まれた時，父Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteithは38歳，母Mary Menteithは32歳であった。1279年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアでJohn Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennoxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1304年10月以後にイギリススコットランドで死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elena Stewart(이)가 대략 1255년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Menteith(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1279년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르에서 John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1304년 10월 이후 영국 스코틀랜드에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Abt 1255–Aft October 1304: ойролцоогоор 1255 он–1304 оны Аравдугаар сараас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elena Stewart nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Mary Menteith, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox em 1279, em Stirlingshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após outubro de 1304, em Escócia, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elena Stewart родилась около 1255 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Menteith, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox в 1279 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после октябрь 1304 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

sm.Abt 1255–Aft October 1304: e tusa o le 1255–ina ua ma'ea le Oketopa 1304

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elena Stewart nació aproximadamente 1255, en Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Mary Menteith, tenía 32 años. Se casó con John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox en 1279, en Stirlingshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de octubre de 1304, en Escocia, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
